_notes: Caps are a CEILING. Individual tasks cannot override these — split the task instead.

maxCumulativeOutputTokens / cacheReadRatioFloor rotation triggers MUST use segment-scoped counters (OutputTokensAtLastRotation), NOT lifetime totals. A lifetime counter re-trips on the turn AFTER rotation and produces an infinite rotation loop (see relay/SETUP.md Troubleshooting #1).
Rotation must clear native session handles for ALL peer roles, not only the active one (C2 contract). See relay/SETUP.md Troubleshooting #2.
carryForwardMaxBytes mirrors the DIALOGUE-PROTOCOL.md handoff.context cap.
